description_long: This is a weathered, upright gravestone made of stone, likely marble or granite, with a rectangular base and an arched top. The front face features engraved inscriptions, including names, dates, and an epitaph, though some text is partially eroded due to age and exposure. The surface is mottled with patches of lichen, moss, and discoloration, giving it an aged, historical appearance. The back is plain and similarly weathered, with no visible inscriptions or decorations. The sides are relatively thin and show the same stone texture, with some chipping and surface irregularities. The gravestone stands on a solid rectangular plinth, providing stability and a slight elevation above ground level.
description: A weathered upright gravestone with engraved inscriptions, arched top, and a rectangular stone base, covered in patches of lichen and discoloration.
description_view_0: The front view shows the engraved inscriptions, arched top, and weathered stone surface with visible text and lichen.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thin profile of the gravestone and the rectangular base, with surface texture and discoloration.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, weathered stone surface with no inscriptions, showing more discoloration and moss.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the gravestone's thinness and the rectangular base, similar to the left side, with visible aging.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: Her children arise up and call her blessed
